name: RBAC Role Assignment
description: Structure documentation for an RBAC role assignment — the binding of a principal (user, group, or service account) to a role.

fields.name: id
fields.description: Unique identifier for the assignment record.

fields.name: principalId
fields.description: Identifier of the user, group, or service account being assigned the role.

fields.name: principalType
fields.description: Type of principal receiving the role.

fields.name: roleId
fields.description: Identifier of the role being assigned.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: Scope of the assignment — global, organization, project, or resource.

fields.name: grantedBy
fields.description: Identifier of the principal that granted this assignment.

fields.name: grantedAt
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the assignment was granted.

fields.name: expiresAt
fields.description: Optional expiration timestamp for time-limited role assignments.
